context_updates.run_tests.result:
The Run Tests step for scc-tsa is complete. Summary of what was done in this final stretch:

- Verified the two remaining background dispatches (AC4 prod-errors reproduction, AC2/AC3 gate-status branching) by independently re-checking every claimed `bd` mutation against `bd show`/`bd human list` ‚Äî all matched.
- While finalizing AC6, my own real `npm audit` run exposed that the "clean" fixture (`lodash@4.17.21`) was actually still vulnerable to a newer advisory ‚Äî corrected it to `4.18.1` and re-verified zero findings, then ran a live dispatch to confirm the detector produces zero side effects against the corrected fixture.
- Found and disclosed two genuine spec/tooling drifts (a stale `bd human --reason` command in `SKILL.md`, and lib-upgrades' AC-generation understating the real safe-version threshold), plus two fixture-design defects I caught and fixed myself.
- Authored `plugins/triage/tests/PRESSURE-TEST.md` (permanent artifact, all AC1-AC6 confirmed with evidence) and `.pas/test-results.md` (pipeline-facing summary).
- Closed all 7 real test-artifact beads (`scc-9jx`, `scc-9lt`, `scc-9kx`, `scc-aci`, `scc-g5m`, `scc-9b9`, `scc-cis`) with a clear test-artifact reason; `scc-tsa` itself left untouched (`in_progress`) for a later pipeline node.

Final `git status`:
```
 M .claude-plugin/marketplace.json
 M .pas/current_task.md
 M .pas/investigation.md
 M .pas/logs/two-system-architecture-e64d8f93/checkpoint.json
 M README.md
?? plugins/triage/
```

Per the conservative git profile, no commit was made. Ready for the Verify step.

context_updates.verify.result:
Confirmed: this is prose from an earlier commit (`72d50da`), not part of this task's diff, and it's non-functional (explanatory text about why the data-steward seat matters ‚Äî no import, no special-casing, no logic branch on triage). It's the same line already checked in the prior close_task step.

All checks pass:

**Diff:** New `plugins/triage/` plugin (manifest, triage-spine SKILL.md, 2 detector SKILL.md files, detector registry, foundry-recipes doc, README) plus clean registration in root `marketplace.json`/`README.md`. `.pas/*` changes are session bookkeeping consistent with prior phases.

**Linter:** No new Python files in the plugin itself (only a fixture `checkout.py` under `tests/`); `ruff check --fix plugins/triage` ‚Üí "All checks passed!" `verify_plugin.py` ‚Üí exit 0, manifests valid, versions match.

**Tests:** `.pas/test-results.md` and the 347-line `plugins/triage/tests/PRESSURE-TEST.md` document 5 live `Agent` dispatches with independently re-verified `bd` side effects across 5 fixture sets, self-caught and corrected two fixture defects, all cleaned up (7 test beads closed, temp files removed).

**Acceptance criteria**, each traced to concrete SKILL.md text and live-dispatch evidence:
- AC1 (lib-upgrades fixture ‚Üí bead w/ AC) ‚Äî `SKILL.md` Phase 3, verified via `scc-9jx` ‚úì
- AC2 (all 4 panel statuses ‚Üí documented outcomes) ‚Äî Phase 6 branching, verified via `bd human list` ‚úì
- AC3 (escalated ‚Üí unparked + sovereignty annotation) ‚Äî Phase 6, verified via `scc-g5m` ‚úì
- AC4 (prod-errors + E2E repro before fix) ‚Äî Phase 4 hard ordering constraint, verified via `scc-9kx` ‚úì
- AC5 (contract validation rejection) ‚Äî Phase 1, 6 ordered checks, verified via malformed-batch fixture ‚úì
- AC6 (zero findings ‚Üí no side effects) ‚Äî Phase 2, verified via corrected clean fixture + real `npm audit` ‚úì

**Invariants:** Dependency direction confirmed correct ‚Äî `triage-spine/SKILL.md` explicitly states the triage‚Üíreview-panel-only direction and only *invokes* `review-panel --mode=agent`/reads its contract; review-panel contains no functional reference to triage (the one line found is pre-existing prose from commit `72d50da`, outside this diff, non-functional). Coverage-honesty and graceful-degradation language present throughout.

PASS

context_snapshot.check_remaining.label: MORE
context_snapshot.goal: Implement all child tasks of epic scc-hzj: Two-System Architecture √¢¬Ä¬î Security, Data Stewardship, Taste, Variants, and Triage Spine. Implements the five goals of the Two-System Architecture PRD/SPEC (2026-07-16): a security review pass, a data-layer sovereignty system, a codified-taste system, a parallel variant-exploration plugin, and a Foundry-resident triage spine (System 2 v1). All work is built on top of review-panel as the sole diff-review substrate √¢¬Ä¬î no phase may introduce a second review mechanism. Five invariants apply across every phase: (1) Substrate rule √¢¬Ä¬î any component producing a diff hands it to review-panel (interactive by default, --mode=agent unattended); (2) Dependency direction √¢¬Ä¬î triage √¢¬Ü¬í review-panel and foundry √¢¬Ü¬í {panel, triage} only; review-panel never imports from or special-cases triage; (3) Coverage honesty √¢¬Ä¬î every seat/pass that cannot run must report the gap explicitly, never silently skip; (4) Graceful cross-plugin degradation √¢¬Ä¬î where one plugin references another, absence degrades to current behavior plus an explicit coverage note; (5) Human artifacts are human-owned √¢¬Ä¬î DATA-MODEL.md and TASTE.md are written via human grilling sessions; agents may propose edits but FIX never auto-modifies them. Build order is strictly Phase 1 √¢¬Ü¬í 2 √¢¬Ü¬í 3 √¢¬Ü¬í 4 √¢¬Ü¬í 5, with Phase 4 blocked on Phase 3 (taste is the scoring function) and Phase 5 blocked on both Phase 1 and Phase 2 (security seat and data-steward/sovereignty path must exist before triage feeds dependency and migration diffs into the pipeline).
